summary: Services enrichment and redesign verified. 6 services enriched with gallery_images, brands, feature_cards, and related_products. Service pages redesigned with same template as solution pages. Admin CMS for both solutions and services now has all required editable fields. All 39 backend tests pass. UI tests verified consultation-design, home-cinema-multi-room-av, security-surveillance-systems pages with all required sections. No regression on solutions pages (smart-home, boardrooms-auditoriums). Homepage loads correctly.

tests: consultation-design: Hero with split-layout, Service Overview, Feature Cards (What You Get), Solutions We Deploy (5 cards), Brands (Control4, Crestron, etc), Inspirations gallery, FAQ, CTA
home-cinema-multi-room-av: ENTERTAINMENT category, cinema brands (Sony, KEF, B&W), 6 solution cards, Inspirations
security-surveillance-systems: SECURITY category, security brands (Hikvision, Axis, etc), all sections present
network-infrastructure-it: network brands (Ubiquiti, Cisco Meraki), all sections working
GET /api/services/{slug} returns brands array with 5+ brands
GET /api/services/{slug} returns gallery_images array with 3+ images
GET /api/services/{slug} returns feature_cards array with proper structure (title, description, benefits)
GET /api/services/{slug} returns related_products array with solution slugs
Admin Solutions page shows: Total Solutions: 85, Featured: 37, With Gallery: 85, Categories: 29
Content column shows 'X img' and 'Y prod' counts for gallery_images and related_products
Edit form has Gallery Images, Feature Cards, Brands, Related Products sections
Admin Services page loads with Services Management heading
Edit form has Gallery Images (Inspirations), Feature Cards, Brands, Related Solutions sections
smart-home: Products We Offer (8 cards), Brands We Integrate (10 brands), Inspirations gallery
boardrooms-auditoriums: What You Get (3 cards), Products We Offer, Brands, Inspirations
Homepage loads with INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING heading

critical_code_review_comments: Service page template now matches solution page design (split-layout hero, feature cards, solutions we deploy, brands, inspirations)
All enrichment fields (gallery_images, brands, feature_cards, related_products) properly flow from API to frontend
Admin CMS correctly manages all editable fields for both solutions and services
6 services enriched out of 12 total - others may need enrichment if required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Services CMS enrichment complete for 6 services (consultation-design, home-cinema-multi-room-av, security-surveillance-systems, network-infrastructure-it, system-engineering-integration, wiring). Each has: brands, gallery_images, feature_cards, related_products. Service pages now use same design pattern as solution pages with split-layout hero and all new sections. Admin CMS has full CRUD for all fields. 85 solutions have gallery images.
